untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-level analysis (tick direction classification 'b_t', cumulative tick imbalance, tick direction probability P[b=1]) and custom EWMA calculations on tick sequences. These are not available in the provided indicator set, which operates only at bar/candle level. The signal fundamentally requires intrabar tick data processing and custom probabilistic measures that cannot be mapped to standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: LOPEZ_DRY_0_0 is a tick imbalance bar formation rule from market microstructure theory. It triggers bar closures based on tick direction clustering, not price action. Required inputs: (1) tick-by-tick direction sequence, (2) cumulative imbalance tracking, (3) EWMA of tick probabilities. The allowed indicator set contains no tick-level metrics, volume profile analysis, or order flow measures. To implement this signal, a backtest engine would need custom tick data feed and microstructure preprocessing layer.
